Notice Of Motion And Motion 1) To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories; And 2) For Sanctions;
Off Calendar Dec-06-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Charles J. Wisch, Esq. of the Law Office of Charles J. Wisch, Tel. 415.788.1945, for cross complainants and moving party;
Peter L. Weber, Esq. of Murphy Pearson Bradley & Feeney, Tel. 415.788.1900, for defendants/cross complainant;
Patricia Leary, Esq. of the Deckard Law Firm, Tel. 408.971.4359, for the plaintiffs and opposing party.

RULING: The parties stipulated to the Pro Tem Judge. The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court modified its tentative ruling on CROSS COMPLAINANTs CHARLES WISCH and BARBARA FARLEY's Motion 1) To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories; And 2) For Sanctions. The motion is denied without prejudice. The prevailing party to submit a proposed order. Judge Pro Tem: Geoffrey Howard; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
